workplan: Build Agent 1: Intent Extraction. Parse raw user natural language (English/Urdu) into structured JSON with service_type, location, urgency, budget_range, description.
tasks_completed: Defined INTENT_INSTRUCTION prompt with strict JSON output schema
Implemented extract_intent() with JSON parse + fallback error handling
Added markdown code-block stripping for LLM output cleanup
decisions_made: Use enum constraint for service_type: AC_REPAIR, PLUMBING, ELECTRICAL, CLEANING, CARPENTRY, OTHER
Use enum for urgency: URGENT, NORMAL, FLEXIBLE
Return raw_input echo in output for traceability
Graceful fallback: return partial result with parse_error key if JSON fails
outcome: Intent agent successfully extracts structured booking intents from English and Urdu/Roman Urdu messages. Service: AC_REPAIR | Location: DHA Lahore | Urgency: URGENT confirmed in pipeline test.
